Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Erick I. Navarro-Delgado. Author, maintainer.

  • Keegan Korthauer. Author.

  • Michael S. Kobor. Author.

  • Lluís Revilla Sancho. Reviewer.

  • Ulduz Vafadarshamasbi. Reviewer.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Navarro-Delgado E, Edwards K, Fu M, Merrill S, Konwar C, MacIsaac J, Lin D, Mandhane P, Simons E, Subbarao P, Moraes T, Lahti J, Miller G, Binder E, Raikkonen K, Turvey S, Korthauer K, Kobor M (2025). “RAMEN: Dissecting individual, additive and interactive gene-environment contributions to DNA methylome variability in cord blood.” Genome Biology, 26(1), 29. doi:10.1186/s13059-025-03864-4. 

@Article{,
  title = {RAMEN: Dissecting individual, additive and interactive gene-environment contributions to DNA methylome variability in cord blood},
  author = {Erick I. Navarro-Delgado and Karlie Edwards and Maggie P. Fu and Sarah M. Merrill and Chaini Konwar and Julie L. MacIsaac and David T.S. Lin and Piush Mandhane and Elinor Simons and Padmaja Subbarao and Theo J. Moraes and Jari Lahti and Gregory E. Miller and Elisabeth B. Binder and Katri Raikkonen and Stuart E. Turvey and Keegan Korthauer and Michael S. Kobor},
  journal = {Genome Biology},
  year = {2025},
  volume = {26},
  number = {1},
  pages = {29},
  doi = {10.1186/s13059-025-03864-4},
}

Navarro-Delgado E, Korthauer K, Kobor M (2025). RAMEN: RAMEN: Regional Association of DNA Methylome variability with the Exposome and geNome. R package version 2.0.0, https://github.com/ErickNavarroD/RAMEN. 

@Manual{RAMEN,
  title = {RAMEN: RAMEN: Regional Association of DNA Methylome variability with the Exposome and geNome},
  author = {Erick I. Navarro-Delgado and Keegan Korthauer and Michael S. Kobor},
  note = {R package version 2.0.0},
  year = {2025},
  url = {https://github.com/ErickNavarroD/RAMEN},
}
